title: Bacon Baked German Bread
description: A dense, malty german bread infused with the smoky flavor of bacon, perfect as a side for your favorite indian dishes.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups german, 1 teaspoon yeast, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Gradually add 1 cup warm water while mixing until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
6. Cut the risen dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each into a roll.
7. Place the rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving space between each roll for even baking.
8. Bake the rolls in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and sound hollow when tapped.
9. Meanwhile, cook the bacon slices in a pan until crispy, then chop them into small pieces.
10. Once the rolls are done, brush them with melted butter and sprinkle with chopped bacon.
11. Let the rolls cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving.
